name: Bazarr
description: Manage and download subtitles for Sonarr and Radarr
compose:
name: slashnode-bazarr
services:
  server:
    image: linuxserver/bazarr:1.5.6
    container_name: server
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    environment:
      PUID: '1000'
      PGID: '1000'
    volumes:
      - server_data-config:/config
      - server_shared-data-storage-downloads:/downloads
    ports:
      - 127.0.0.1:6767:6767
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
volumes:
  server_data-config:
    name: slashnode-bazarr_server_data-config
  server_shared-data-storage-downloads:
    name: slashnode-bazarr_server_shared-data-storage-downloads
notes: Auto-converted from getumbrel/umbrel-apps (bazarr). Review before shipping. Upstream: https://www.bazarr.media/.
